title: Actual Geyser
description: This datapack adds geyser, naturally generating in jagged peaks.
body:
# Geyser

![Geyser preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SZDCJ3Fr/images/93877218cfb50dc655077f52f39ce82fc13577b6.gif)

Geysers can be found in jagged peaks, usually near the top of the mountain, and always has a lava pool under it. Going inside of it gives damage

The water goes up and down, but if the water get removed, the geyser will stop working.

To manually place a geyser (for mapmaking), use /place structure geyser:geyser
